workshoptitle: AI Vector Search on Your Laptop with Oracle AI Database Free

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the workshop and what you will build.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Install Oracle AI Database AI with Podman
tutorials.description: Install Oracle AI Database  on your laptop using Podman containers.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Connect to Oracle Database from Python
tutorials.description: Set up a Python environment and verify the database connection.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Load an ONNX Embedding Model into Oracle Database
tutorials.description: Download and load a pre-built ONNX embedding model into Oracle AI Database 26ai.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Load PDFs, Create Embeddings, and Search
tutorials.description: Load PDF documents, chunk text with VECTOR_CHUNKS, generate embeddings, and perform cosine similarity search.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Build a Flask Web Application for PDF Search
tutorials.description: Build a complete Flask application for PDF upload and semantic similarity search.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving live help.
